column1: SEC-NON-COMMERCE-AUD|Reject tokens that are not intended for commerce APIs|sh tests/security/verify-cart-security-live.sh SEC-NON-COMMERCE-AUD|cart service denies aud != commerce-api before domain work runs|Add cart-service JWT gate and a local/test-only non-commerce token fixture that fails closed without exposing token material

SEC-SCOPE-WITHOUT-RELATIONSHIP|Reject Alice reading Bob's cart even when Alice has cart:read|sh tests/security/verify-cart-security-live.sh SEC-SCOPE-WITHOUT-RELATIONSHIP|JWT and scope pass, SpiceDB denies cart:bob-cart#read@user:alice|Seed Alice/Bob carts and call ResourceAuthorizer for every cart read

SEC-RELATIONSHIP-WITHOUT-SCOPE|Reject a cart owner whose token lacks the required cart scope|sh tests/security/verify-cart-security-live.sh SEC-RELATIONSHIP-WITHOUT-SCOPE|relationship exists, ScopeAuthorizer denies missing cart scope before resource or domain work runs|Add local/test-only missing-scope token fixture and keep scope/resource gates separate

SEC-SPOOFED-IDENTITY-HEADERS|Reject browser attempts to spoof trusted identity headers|sh tests/security/verify-cart-security-live.sh SEC-SPOOFED-IDENTITY-HEADERS|APISIX strips unsafe identity headers and service traces trusted principal only|Add protected cart route through APISIX plus bounded stripped-header trace evidence

SEC-BROWSER-AUTHORIZATION-OVERWRITTEN|Reject browser-provided bearer headers by overwriting them at the gateway|sh tests/security/verify-cart-security-live.sh SEC-BROWSER-AUTHORIZATION-OVERWRITTEN|service sees only the gateway-injected masked token fingerprint|Add gateway overwrite proof and bounded token-fingerprint trace evidence

SEC-RELATIONSHIP-REMOVAL-IMMEDIATE|Reject cart reads immediately after SpiceDB owner relationship removal|HARNESS_PROFILE=local sh tests/security/verify-cart-security-live.sh SEC-RELATIONSHIP-REMOVAL-IMMEDIATE|next read denies without re-login after owner relationship removal|Add local/test-only relationship mutation fixture that fails closed outside the profile and restore the relationship after the check
